perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up shot of a woman's legs as she walks on a treadmill. (2) The scene shifts to a middle-aged man in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts also walking on a treadmill, accompanied by a younger man who appears to be a coach. (3) A young woman in a green plaid shirt sits and speaks directly to the camera, smiling and gesturing. (4) The middle-aged couple is shown performing various exercises, including stretching with their arms raised and walking on treadmills. (5) Finally, the middle-aged man is shown sitting by a window, looking at the camera with a satisfied expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic pop music plays throughout the video. (2) A young female voice speaks continuously with a cheerful, friendly, and humorous tone, explaining the context of her parents exercising. (3) Ambient gym sounds, such as the low hum of treadmill motors, are subtly audible in the background. (4) At the end of the video, a middle-aged male voice says a short, confident phrase in response to a question.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the young woman's speech about bringing her parents to the gym. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '督促中...' (Supervising...) and '把爸媽抓來運動的女兒' (The daughter who caught her parents to exercise) appear as titles. (3) Emotional Text: '小CASE' (Small case) appears at the end when the father speaks, reflecting a humorous and confident tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Workout intro -> Narrative explanation by daughter -> Montage of parents exercising -> Post-workout reaction.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (daughter), 2 parents (father and mother), and 1 fitness coach assisting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman in a green and black plaid shirt; a middle-aged woman in a black oversized t-shirt and light-colored jeans; a middle-aged man in a white graphic t-shirt and khaki shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor gym equipped with multiple Matrix brand treadmills, exercise bikes, and other fitness equipment. Large floor-to-ceiling windows look out onto greenery.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even indoor lighting with natural light from windows.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Contextual Narration -> Progress Montage -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lighthearted personal vlog documenting the creator's effort to encourage her elderly parents to maintain their health through exercise. By hiring a professional coach, she emphasizes safety and proper technique for seniors, ultimately celebrating their progress and successful workout session with a humorous ending.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on a personal family activity without specific calls to action or product deep-dives.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct-to-camera storytelling, text-heavy overlays with variety-show aesthetics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content leverages the 'filial piety' theme common in social media vlogs, using a relatable situation to engage viewers.
